top_signals.title: Here we go again? Assessing the inflation risks of the recent energy shock − speech by Megan Greene
top_signals.summary: Given at University of Derby Business School
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Gulf tensions escalate as Iran hits Kuwait, US strikes near Hormuz
top_signals.summary: CENTCOM said it had carried out a new round of defensive strikes in southern Iran, while an Iranian drone attack on the Kuwait airport killed one person.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Slumping Chinese oil imports ‘shield’ global market from higher prices
top_signals.summary: Traders and analysts say near-decade-low shipments are a major factor in why crude still trades at less than $100 a barrel
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: CrowdStrike narrowly beats estimates on AI tailwinds, but stock falls 10%
top_signals.summary: CrowdStrike shares have rallied nearly 60% this year on skyrocketing demand for cybersecurity in the age of advanced artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: DOE awards $67M to ElementUSA, Colorado School of Mines for rare earth processing plant
top_signals.summary: The facility, the company said, has the potential to make the Louisiana residue one of the only depleting bauxite residue waste resources in the world.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: Speech At the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research, Stanford University, Stanford, California
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Indonesian Rout Deepens as Rupiah Breaks 18,000; Stocks Tumble
top_signals.summary: Indonesian markets tumbled on Thursday, with the rupiah breaching the key 18,000-per-dollar level and stocks hitting a near six-year low, as mounting policy uncertainty and macro headwinds spooked investors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: XPO’s Q2 tonnage trending ahead of guidance
top_signals.summary:
Less-than-truckload carrier XPO seems set to exceed its second-quarter tonnage projection based on the company's May update.

The post XPO’s Q2 tonnage trending ahead of guidance appeared first on FreightWaves.
